title: bidens lindleyi
intro: Bidens lindleyi, also known as the Asian bidens or thistle weed, is a flowering plant native to Southeast Asia and the Pacific Islands, belonging to the aster family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Bidens lindleyi include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to reduce pain and inflammation. In herbal preparations, Bidens lindleyi is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
